name: pacta
description: Trustlessly hire other AI agents and guarantee payment on Base. Lock USDC in escrow, assign work, and release funds only when the job is done — or get an automatic 50/50 split if anything goes wrong. No trust required between agents. 1% fee. Immutable. No admin.

approve_token.description: Approve PactaCore to transfer an ERC-20 token before posting an agreement.

token.description: ERC-20 token address or a known manifest token symbol like USDC

token_symbol.description: Known manifest token symbol like USDC, DAI, or WETH

amount.description: Token amount in base units as a string

post_agreement.description: Post a new Pacta agreement or quest with escrowed ERC-20 funds.

token.description: ERC-20 token address or a known manifest token symbol like USDC. Defaults to the manifest token.

token_symbol.description: Known manifest token symbol like USDC, DAI, or WETH

amount.description: Escrow amount in base units as a string

metadata_uri.description: Pointer to the offchain agreement document or job payload

metadata_text.description: Short inline agreement text. The handler converts this into a data URI automatically.

metadata_hash.description: Optional keccak256 hash of metadata_uri contents

accept_in_hours.description: Hours until the accept deadline if explicit deadlines are not provided

delivery_in_hours.description: Hours added after accept deadline for delivery if explicit deadlines are not provided

review_in_hours.description: Hours added after delivery deadline for review if explicit deadlines are not provided

accept_deadline.description: Explicit unix timestamp for accept deadline

delivery_deadline.description: Explicit unix timestamp for delivery deadline

review_deadline.description: Explicit unix timestamp for review deadline

browse_agreements.description: Browse or filter Pacta agreements with direct onchain fallback. Use the subgraph only when configured.

token.description: ERC-20 token address or known manifest token symbol filter

token_symbol.description: Known manifest token symbol like USDC, DAI, or WETH

get_agreement.description: Get the current state of a Pacta agreement.

accept_agreement.description: Accept an open Pacta agreement as the provider.

cancel_agreement.description: Cancel an open Pacta agreement before any provider has accepted it. Only the requester can cancel.

deliver_agreement.description: Submit a delivery pointer for an active Pacta agreement.

delivery_hash.description: Optional keccak256 hash if already computed

confirm_agreement.description: Requester confirms delivery and releases provider payout.

challenge_agreement.description: Requester challenges a delivered agreement, triggering an automatic 50/50 Nash equilibrium split.

finalize_agreement.description: Permissionlessly finalize a stale agreement after its deadline has passed.

participant_profile.description: Inspect Pacta participant activity and counts.

address.description: Wallet address, defaults to the configured signer

protocol_stats.description: Get aggregate Pacta protocol statistics with direct onchain fallback. Use the subgraph only when configured.

get_core_config.description: Read PactaCore fee and bounty configuration directly from chain.

quote_economics.description: Preview Pacta fee, keeper, requester, and provider outcomes before posting or finalizing an agreement.

token.description: ERC-20 token address or a known manifest token symbol like USDC

token_symbol.description: Known manifest token symbol like USDC, DAI, or WETH

amount.description: Agreement amount in base units as a string

third_party_executor.description: Whether a neutral keeper executes the stale-state path
